name: Send a daily Shopify order report with Streamline Connector and Gmail
description:
Generate and email a daily Shopify order report using Streamline Connector. The workflow retrieves recent orders, filters those from the last 24 hours, formats them into a clean HTML summary, and sends the report to a specified email address. Ideal for daily operational visibility, sales monitoring, and automated reporting without manual exports.

How it works

The workflow runs on a daily schedule or can be triggered manually  
Streamline Connector retrieves orders from your Shopify store  
Orders from the last 24 hours are filtered from the results  
Each order is formatted into an HTML report  
The report is sent to the configured Gmail address as a daily summary  

Set up steps

Estimated setup time: ~2 minutes  

Create a Streamline Connector credential using your Shop ID  
Select the credential in the Streamline Connector node  
Create or connect your Gmail credential in the send email node  
Change the recipient email address in the Gmail node  
Save the workflow and activate it to begin sending daily reports  

Use cases

Receive automated daily sales summaries  
Monitor new orders without logging into Shopify  
Share order activity with stakeholders via email  
Maintain a daily operational snapshot for reporting  
Trigger downstream workflows based on daily order volume
